cards.front: What does 8 hours refer to in discrete mathematical structures?
cards.back: A typical duration for a proof or an algorithm in a discrete mathematics course

cards.front: What is generally the expected duration of a typical problem in a discrete mathematics course?
cards.back: 8 hours of work to complete the problem

cards.front: In discrete mathematics, what is the typical time frame for a proof?
cards.back: 8 hours of uninterrupted work on a proof

cards.front: What is the common benchmark for completing a discrete mathematics problem?
What is the standard amount of time allocated for a problem in a discrete mathematics course?
cards.back: 8 hours of uninterrupted time to complete the problem
